_note: Gate runs per produced image (one file at a time). Default canvas is 1080x1080 (square post); portrait variant 1080x1920 may override via brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json.

checks.desc: (a) No text is clipped, cut at an edge, or overflowing its container — every headline, body line, eyebrow, and label is fully visible.
(b) Text-to-background contrast is strong and legible at thumbnail size — no light-grey-on-dark, no same-hue collisions, no color-on-busy-image failures.
(c) Palette matches the brand navy/green scheme — not generic stock-template colors (#3b82f6, #333, plain white/grey).

(d) Clear premium visual hierarchy — one dominant focal element (headline, stat, or illustration), supporting copy clearly subordinate; depth present (shadows, elevation, rounded cards, deliberate spacing) — not a bare title on a plain background.
(e) Consistent, generous margins and padding — content is not crammed to an edge and not floating in dead space; layout is intentionally aligned to a shared grid.
